title: Le bateau d'Émile
writer: Michel Audiard, Georges Simenon, Albert Valentin
actors: Annie Girardot, Lino Ventura, Michel Simon
plot: Charles-Edmond, the eldest of the Larmentiel brothers decides to return to his hometown La Rochelle to die. Forty years earlier, he had been driven by his father. Before passing away he had announced that he has a hidden son, Emil...
